name: fireclaude
description: Self-hosted Firecrawl Claude Code skill — scrape, crawl, search, extract, change tracking, webhook testing, model swap. No API keys.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
  fireclaude installed.
  Bootstrap the stack: fireclaude setup
  Then check status: fireclaude status
  Optional short alias: fireclaude alias install
')"
